news.headline: Oceans reach hottest June on record as El Niño threatens higher temperatures
news.summary: The world's oceans recorded their hottest June ever, European scientists said on Wednesday, warning that the emergence of an El Niño weather pattern alongside human-driven climate change could push sea and air temperatures to fresh records in the months ahead.
